principle: Screwm spatial, temporal, media, and aural choices must be justified by declared embodied-perception, garden, media-theory, anti-parasocial, and audiovisual constraints before they enter the live Quake/DarkPlaces + Hapax compositor hybrid. Homage Wards receive substance through their source identity and through their constant declared interaction with the drift/compositing system; geometry alone is never the entity.

research_lanes.focus: embodied being-within, body schema, affordances, orientation
roji, stroll garden, miegakure, ma, borrowed scenery, compression and release
Gestalt grouping, depth cues, visual hierarchy, clutter, motion sickness, contrast, luminance adaptation
viewing distance, screen angular size, focal length/FOV, pause points, readable aspect ratios, wayfinding, room scale, and immersive rather than theatrical screen placement
medium specificity, remediation, liveness, media archaeology, screens inside worlds
anti-extractive audience relation, mediated presence boundaries, role/consent/source legibility
luminance hierarchy, adaptation, fog, bloom, material readability, temporal drift and flicker
soundscape, auditory scene analysis, acousmatic/synchresis, near-far sonic staging

media_constraints.media_visibility_priority: scale geometry to media legibility rather than forcing media into arbitrary frame proportions

failure_predicates: Any media surface lacks a deterministic mount contract.
A camera or YouTube ward is visibly letterboxed/cropped for arbitrary frame reasons rather than declared source aspect or projection reasons.
The default path has no stable AoA-oriented station suitable for OBS feedback.
The room reads as a front-facing theater instead of a no-front walkable environment.
A ward cannot be identified by role and purpose from its intended inspection station.
The AoA sphere is not centered within the AoA volume or the AoA base is not parallel to the floor.
Global brightness pulses by more than 10 percent every 4-8 seconds without an explicit audio/state cue.
More than three primary media wards compete in the same pause view.
Dynamic motion distracts without revealing affordance, state, or drift pressure.
Camera movement exceeds the yaw velocity/acceleration budget during default review.
A camera ward presents the operator as a parasocial face-object rather than a bounded system source.
A fourth-wall surface, HUD, or screen-space effect is treated as a ward or final spatial entity.
Physical BSP frames, standoffs, status spines, or decorative mount chrome are emitted by default instead of coordinate-bound compositor/CSQC mount expression.
A Homage Ward has no declared drift/compositing interaction to give shape to the receiver and source.
A Homage Ward receiver has a visible border, backing panel, grid background, or physical chrome not required by the ward's source/purpose contract.
A ward's visible size or aspect ratio is inherited from atlas storage rather than from source aspect, media legibility, and intended inspection distance.
A full-frame drift or GLSL effect carries ward semantics without an explicit entity, mask, depth, or receiver contract.
The default recurrent path period is below 300 seconds or changes instantaneous speed instead of station dwell/selection.
A Homage package embeds licensed/risk-specific choices in the portable framework instead of isolating them in the homage distribution layer.
